channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iranian strike kills Bahraini woman after hitting residential building
item.description: A suspected Iranian attack on a high-rise residential building in Bahrain's capital of Manama has killed a woman.

item.title: Woman killed in Bahrain as Gulf states intercept more Iranian missiles
item.description: Strikes continue as Trump says US attacks on Iran will dramatically increase if it tries to close Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Afghanistan vs Sri Lanka cricket series called off due to Iran war
item.description: Afghanistan were due to host Sri Lanka for a six-match series in the UAE, which has been hit by attacks from Iran.

item.title: US to end prosecution of Turkiye’s Halkbank over alleged business with Iran
item.description: US prosecutors say Turkish assistance in negotiating ceasefire , release of captives from Gaza contributed to settlement.

item.title: Gaza food prices soar as crossing closures deepen shortages amid Iran war
item.description: Families are buying whatever they can while supplies last, fearing that food available today may not be there tomorrow.

item.title: The ‘Fourth Successor’: Iran’s plan for a long war with the US and Israel
item.description: Tehran built a doctrine to absorb shock, survive decapitation strikes and turn time into a weapon.

item.title: US consumers express dismay over rising gas prices after attack on Iran
item.description: Oil prices have shot up as the war snarls transportation and production in one of the most energy-rich regions on earth.

item.title: Australia to send missiles to UAE, surveillance plane to help Gulf defence
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese said missiles and reconnaissance plane will be sent to region.

item.title: Trump claims Iran planned to ‘take over Middle East’ before US attacked
item.description: US President Donald Trump cites “information and belief” for his claim that Iran would have taken over the Middle East.

item.title: Trump says some sanctions to be lifted on oil producers amid Iran war
item.description: Crude oil prices plunge below $90 a barrel following an earlier surge to almost $120 in price swing over 24 hours.
